evaluation.reason: Statement 2 says, “The right hand, in a relaxed curved C-handshape… moves from the right side near the head diagonally down to mid-chest to meet the left hand.”

qa_pairs.question: Which hand is positioned at chest level in a curved C-shape, stays in place, and receives the approaching partner before they close slightly together?
qa_pairs.options: Left hand / Right hand / Both hands

evaluation.reason: Statement 2 notes the right hand moves to “meet the left hand, which forms a C-handshape,” and they come together “at chest level,” implying the left hand is positioned there to receive the right

qa_pairs.question: During the change from loose fists to open shapes, do the fingers stay closed without spreading?

evaluation.reason: Statement 1 specifies the hands “open into 5-handshapes with fingers spread,” so the fingers do not stay closed

qa_pairs.question: Answer only "touch" or "not touch" - whether two hands visibly touch each other or not

evaluation.reason: Statement 3 explicitly states “touch,” and Statement 2 adds they close slightly “while maintaining contact.”
